title: linum austriacum var. crystallinum
intro: Linum austriacum var. crystallinum, also known as crystal flax, is a perennial plant species in the flax family (Linaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema. The health benefits of crystal flax include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Linum austriacum var. crystallinum can be made into creams, ointments, and salves, which are used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
